title: Passing a string in a parameter with an implicit type
body:
An error occurred when hierarchically passing a string in a parameter with an implicit type in the last module.

Example:

```verilog
module string_param_0 #(parameter S = "");
    initial $display("S = '%s'", S);
endmodule

module string_param_1 #(parameter string S = "");
    string_param_0 #(.S(S)) u_sp0();
endmodule

module test;
    string_param_1 #(.S("Greetings from the old shoes")) u_sp1();

    initial #1 $finish;
endmodule
```

Expected output:
```
S = 'Greetings from the old shoes'
...
```

Actual output:
```
S = '                            '
...
```

If you specify the parameter type `string` in the `string_param_0` module, the error does not occur.

Verilator version: 72a47e16c124e3c0f93c16d5049e0db79764bc01

OS: NixOS 24.11
